title: Real-world clinical outcomes, genetic testing patterns, and treatment patterns of patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer treated with olaparib monotherapy in the United States.
abstract: The PROfound clinical trial showed that patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbored homologous recombination repair gene mutations (HRRm) benefited from receiving olaparib monotherapy. This is the first real-world study in the U.S. to evaluate olaparib monotherapy in patients with mCRPC and HRRm.
trial_name: Olaparib for metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer
